# minio_ilm_tier_stats (Data Source)

Returns transition statistics for all configured ILM storage tiers including object counts and total bytes.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "minio_ilm_tier_stats" "current" {}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of this resource.
- `tiers` (List of Object) (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tiers))

<a id="nestedatt--tiers"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tiers`

Read-Only:

- `name` (String)
- `num_objects` (Number)
- `num_versions` (Number)
- `total_size` (String)
- `type` (String)
